author.bio: Serving your sites over HTTPS+HTTP/2 automatically. On a mission to put every site on HTTPS! Visit our forum for help: http://caddy.community
author.name: Caddy Web Server

author.bio: Internet protocol geek. I write curl. I play with HTTP and QUIC within IETF. On team @wolfSSL. HTTP/3 is coming. I don't know anything.
author.name: Daniel Stenberg

content.text: "curl --insecure" (switches off SSL certificate verification) is found 117,000 times in github hosted code: https://github.com/search?q=curl+--insecure&type=Code&utf8=%E2%9C%93
